Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAURICIO VELIZ's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff Mauricio Veliz's unopposed motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is granted. Plaintiff shall separately file and serve the proposed first amended complaint submitted with the motion, which is not deemed filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
